cases.description: Two independent instructions, different actors, joined by "and" — the real bug this feature fixes. Must split into two units.
cases.sentence: The matter must be heard de novo without a jury and the court must include written findings of fact and conclusions of law in its ruling.

cases.description: Same actor wording on both sides of "and", but referring to two different specific teams. Identical wording must not by itself block the split.
cases.sentence: One of the teams must provide services to people in Seattle and one of the teams must provide services to people in Spokane.

cases.description: The second actor is a non-pronoun back-reference ("such board") to an entity named earlier in the sentence, not to the first clause's own actor. Must still split — a back-reference is only rejected when it points back to the first actor.
cases.sentence: The state treasurer shall notify the college board and such board shall adjust its certificate so that all requirements of moneys shall be fully met at all times.

cases.description: "and, therefore, it must..." — "it" back-references the first clause's own actor. Must NOT split; this is one actor, one instruction.
cases.sentence: The program must meet the diverse needs of Pierce county residents and, therefore, it must be flexible, culturally appropriate, and culturally responsive.

cases.description: "May 15th" is a calendar date, not the permission modal — must not be miscounted as a second instruction.
cases.sentence: A repayment plan required by a landlord must be designed both to pay the past due bill by the following May 15th, or as soon as possible after May 15th if needed to maintain monthly payments.

cases.description: "review and approve" — one actor doing two things, no second modal at all. Must not split.
cases.sentence: The director must review and approve the application.

cases.description: Modal sits immediately after "and" with nothing between — the already-handled same-actor case (renderer.js's splitCompoundAction), left alone at this layer.
cases.sentence: The recipient cannot be charged any fee and must be compensated for expenses.

cases.description: Three independent clauses, not two — documented out-of-scope case. The design only detects a second instruction, not a third, so this stays one unit.
cases.sentence: Three members shall be appointed for a term of one year, three members shall be appointed for a term of two years, and three members shall be appointed for a term of three years.
